candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary row above financial items, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and appears to be a company-wide operating total that may span multiple functions; adding it to COGS would risk misclassification/double counting.
Separate operating depreciation row, but not identified as relating to COGS specifically; likely a component of the total D&A line rather than a COGS-only add-on.
Separate operating amortization row, but not identified as relating to COGS specifically; likely a component of the total D&A line rather than a COGS-only add-on.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Use of materials and supplies'. The excerpt shows D&A only as separate overall operating lines, not as cost-of-sales-specific rows. No explicit 'depreciation in COGS/COR' or similar row is visible, so conservatively do not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary row above financial items and outside the selected SG&A/overhead rows, but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/selling-specific and appears to be a total operating D&A amount that may also include production/other functions.
Separate operating depreciation component line, but not identified as SG&A-specific; likely part of the total D&A summary and not safe to add to XSGA alone.
Separate operating amortization component line, but not identified as SG&A-specific; likely part of the total D&A summary and not safe to add to XSGA alone.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket already uses SG&A/other operating expense/employee rows and explicitly excluded D&A. However, the excerpt provides only total operating D&A lines, not SG&A-specific D&A rows. Because those lines are not clearly attributable to SG&A rather than COGS or other functions, conservative treatment is to add nothing separately to XSGA.
